title: scleranthus annuus subsp. collinus
intro: Scleranthus annuus subsp. collinus, also known as the Alpine Knotgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alpine Knotgrass include its ability to help manage menstrual cramps, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote digestion, among others. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in homeopathy to support overall well-being.
